title: Which Transparent Star Resident Are You?
subtitle: Find out what kind of resident you would become on Transparent Star.

activity.label: Would you keep your online trace alive?
activity.labelCn: 你會維持自己在線上的痕跡嗎？

relation.label: Would you hold real relationships?
relation.labelCn: 你會握住真實的關係嗎？

voice.label: Would you keep what you really wanted to say?
voice.labelCn: 你會留住真正想說的話嗎？

questions.text: A group photo is posted. Everyone is tagged except you.
questions.textCn: 合照被發出來，所有人都被標註，唯獨漏了你

questions.text: You suddenly want to post a real update, then wonder if it is unnecessary.
questions.textCn: 你突然想發一條真實的近況，又覺得好像沒必要

questions.text: The group chat has been silent for a long time. You have something that could restart it.
questions.textCn: 群聊安靜很久了，你手邊有個能重啟話題的東西

questions.text: Someone asks how you have been, and several people are listening.
questions.textCn: 有人問你最近過得怎麼樣，旁邊好幾個人也在聽

questions.text: The system reminds you: you have left no interaction trace today.
questions.textCn: 系統提醒你：今天還沒有留下任何互動痕跡

questions.text: Someone messages you before sleep. You are already exhausted.
questions.textCn: 睡前有人傳訊息給你，你已經很累了

questions.text: Your feed suddenly becomes lively. Everyone seems to be reacting to everyone.
questions.textCn: 你的動態牆突然熱鬧起來，好像所有人都在互相回應

questions.text: Your daily task still needs three interactions to keep your visibility rank safe.
questions.textCn: 每日任務還差三個互動才能保住存在值排名

questions.text: A friend says their day was terrible, but you still have many things to do.
questions.textCn: 朋友說今天過得很糟，但你手邊還有很多事

questions.text: You see the name of an old friend who has been quiet for months.
questions.textCn: 看到一個安靜好幾個月的舊友的名字

questions.text: Someone says something in a group chat and nobody responds.
questions.textCn: 有人在群聊裡說了一句話，沒有人回應

questions.text: Someone asks for help privately. Answering properly will take time.
questions.textCn: 有人私訊求助，好好回答需要花不少時間

questions.text: You want to say something honest, but it may make the atmosphere awkward.
questions.textCn: 你想說一句真話，但可能會讓氣氛變得尷尬

questions.text: The system says your paragraph contains low-value emotion and can be optimized.
questions.textCn: 系統說你的段落含有低價值情緒，可以優化

questions.text: Someone misunderstands you in the comments. Explaining may make it worse.
questions.textCn: 有人在留言區誤解你，解釋可能越描越黑

questions.text: You may leave one last sentence for Transparent Star.

right.label: As long as everyone is fine

questions.textCn: 你可以為透明星留下最後一句話
